message:
web: Update logged-in header with user dropdown and nav icons

- Add user avatar dropdown with sign out option
- Add nav items with icons (Logs, Admin) with active state highlighting
- Replace logo text with emoji only

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/fj1frw644q
